reason: The implementation exceeds thresholds for both file count (5 files) and estimated lines of code (400+), requiring changes across the core implementation engine, CLI workflows, and telemetry systems.
suggestions: INFRA-122-A: Core Runbook Verification Logic: Implement dry-run block verification in the orchestrator and add correction prompts.
INFRA-122-B: Implementation Workflow & Metrics: Integrate the retry loop into the CLI and add observability metrics for verification success.
